phaseGoal: 补齐 public repo 的 GitHub 反馈入口、开源文档入口与公开仓元信息，完成 public snapshot 同步与发布前验证。
deliverable: issue/PR templates, SECURITY.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, README open-source入口, public snapshot sync, release verification
stopCondition: public repo can be cloned by a new user, the open-source entry points are present, and verification passes.
